heading: Guarantee of residency for spouses of servicemembers
label: 4027 Guarantee of residency for spouses of servicemembers
text: For the purposes of establishing the residency of a spouse of a servicemember for any purpose (including the registration of a business), the spouse of a servicemember may elect to use the same residence as the servicemember regardless of the date on which the marriage of the spouse and the servicemember occurred.
notes: Amendments2021— made technical amendment to directory language of .Pub. L. 117–81Pub. L. 116–92, § 1739(a)
